acceptance_criteria.description: GET /greet with no params returns 200 and the default Myles greeting JSON payload.
GET /greet?name=Andrew returns 200 and echoes the normalized name in the JSON payload.
GET /greet?name=andrew&style=shout returns 200 and an uppercase greeting with style shout.
Repository docs explain the /greet contract and how to verify it locally.
The published release artifact contains the /greet behavior and can be verified by the acceptance script.

edge_cases.description: Whitespace-only name input falls back to Myles.
Unsupported style returns 400 with invalid_style and the allowed style list.
